title: Verb Compiler Implementation Plan
summary: Task-by-task implementation plan for building the verb Rust/inkwell compiler producing LLVM IR.
notes: Structured as a checkbox task-by-task implementation plan (file structure, code snippets, task steps), not an ADR (no Context/Decision/Consequences with status), PRD (no user stories/acceptance criteria), or SPEC document itself (it references a separate design spec file). Global Constraints section lists technical decisions already made elsewhere, presented as directives rather than trade-off analysis, so classified as supporting DOC/plan content rather than a locked decision source.
